  • Uses of Document in org.saidone.repository

    Methods in org.saidone.repository that return types with arguments of type Document
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Document>
    DocumentRepository.findByStatusAndRetryCountLessThanAndUpdatedAtBeforeOrderByUpdatedAtAsc(String status, Integer retryCount, Instant updatedAt, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
     
    List<Document>
    DocumentRepository.findByStatusOrderByUpdatedAtAsc(String status, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

  • Uses of Document in org.saidone.service

    Methods in org.saidone.service that return types with arguments of type Document
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Document>
    DocumentProcessingService.claimNext(int maxRetryCount, long retryDelaySeconds)
    Claims the next processable document, preferring never-processed nodes and then retryable failures whose delay has elapsed.
    List<Document>
    DocumentProcessingService.claimNextBatch(int maxRetryCount, long retryDelaySeconds, int batchSize)
    Claims the next processable documents in a single repository round-trip per status, preferring never-processed nodes and filling the remaining slots with retryable failures whose delay has elapsed.
